Keybindings.TogglePanelHint: Show or hide the Mortal Needs panel

EmptyState.Title: No Characters Tracked
EmptyState.Description: Add actors to start tracking their survival needs.
EmptyState.PlayerWaiting: Waiting for the GM to add characters...

Config.Title: Configure Needs
Config.ApplyPresetConfirm: This will enable/disable needs according to the preset. Continue?

NeedEdit.Title: Edit Need
NeedEdit.Label: Display Name
NeedEdit.DeleteConfirm: Are you sure? This will remove the need and all associated data.

EffectConfig.Title: Configure Consequence
EffectConfig.ThresholdHint: When this need reaches this percentage, the consequence triggers. Example: 80 means it fires when the need is 80% stressed.
EffectConfig.TicksHint: How many sustained stress checks happen before the consequence re-applies. Lower values are more punishing.
EffectConfig.ReversibleHint: If checked, this consequence is automatically removed when the need recovers below the threshold.
EffectConfig.NoSuggestions: No system suggestions available for this need.
EffectConfig.AttributePathHint: Path to the actor property. Use the dropdown to pick from your system's known attributes, or type a custom path.

Presets.SurvivalDesc: Classic survival: hunger, thirst, exhaustion, cold, heat
Presets.HorrorDesc: Psychological horror: sanity, morale, pain, corruption
Presets.DarkFantasyDesc: Dark fantasy: hunger, thirst, exhaustion, corruption, sanity
Presets.MinimalistDesc: Simple survival: hunger and thirst only

Settings.DefaultStressHint: The default amount of stress applied per click (1-50).
Settings.PlayerVisibilityHint: Control what players can see in the needs panel.
Settings.PlayerControlHint: Allow players to manage their own character's needs.
Settings.NotifyCriticalHint: Send a chat notification when a need reaches critical level.
Settings.CriticalThresholdHint: The percentage at which a need is considered critical (50-100).
Settings.ConsequenceRemovalHint: How consequences are handled when needs drop below critical.
Settings.ShowConsequenceChatHint: Display styled chat messages when consequences are applied.
Settings.AnimateBarsHint: Enable smooth animations when bar values change.
Settings.BarOrientationHint: Choose between horizontal, vertical, or radial bar display.
Settings.UIScaleHint: Adjust the size of the needs panel (80-200%).
Settings.CompactModeHint: Use a more compact display with smaller portraits.
Settings.FlavorMessagesHint: Enable narrative flavor messages when needs cross severity thresholds.
Settings.FlavorVerbosityHint: Controls how often flavor messages appear in chat.
Settings.FlavorVisibilityHint: Who can see flavor messages in chat.
Settings.FlavorBatchModeHint: Combine simultaneous threshold crossings into a single chat card.

Dialogs.ResetAllContent: Reset all needs for this character to their default values?

SessionFlow.NoTracked: No characters tracked. Use the toolbar to add actors.

Notifications.GMOnly: Only the GM can perform this action.
Notifications.LongRestComplete: Long rest complete — all needs reset.
Notifications.ShortRestComplete: Short rest complete — needs partially relieved.

Migration.Complete: Mortal Needs has been upgraded to v2.0. Your data has been migrated automatically.
Migration.Failed: Mortal Needs migration failed. Check the console for details.

API.Description: Mortal Needs API — Use game.modules.get('mortal-needs').api for programmatic access.

Low.1: A hollow ache settles into the stomach, quiet but insistent.
Low.2: Food crosses the mind unbidden — a persistent, low hum of want.
Low.3: The body sends its first polite request: it would very much like to eat.

Medium.1: Hunger has settled in like an unwelcome guest, demanding and impossible to ignore.
Medium.2: The stomach twists with an urgency that crowds out softer thoughts.
Medium.3: Concentration frays at the edges — the body's patience wearing dangerously thin.

High.1: The body begins to rebel, hunger overriding thought and reason alike.
High.2: A deep, animal need claws its way up from the gut, blotting out everything else.
High.3: Hunger sinks its teeth deep, a patient predator that never sleeps.

Critical.1: The gnawing emptiness becomes a living thing, clawing at the walls of their stomach.
Critical.2: Their body begins to consume itself, a slow and terrible arithmetic of survival.
Critical.3: Starvation writes its name in trembling hands and hollowed cheeks.

High.1: The worst of the hunger retreats, but the body still remembers the ache.
High.2: A little sustenance takes the edge off — enough to think, barely enough to move.
High.3: The gnawing eases, though the stomach still growls its protests.

Medium.1: The hunger dulls to a manageable ache — still present, but no longer commanding.
Medium.2: Food finds its way to where it's needed most, and the body exhales with quiet relief.
Medium.3: The fog of starvation lifts, thought returning in slow, welcome waves.

Low.1: Almost satisfied now. The ordeal fades to a memory the body won't soon forget.
Low.2: Strength trickles back as nourishment does its patient, steady work.
Low.3: The belly quiets. Not quite full, but no longer screaming.

Safe.1: Sustenance floods in like rain after drought, every cell singing with relief.
Safe.2: The first real fullness in ages — the body sags with grateful exhaustion.
Safe.3: Fed and whole again. The hunger was a nightmare, now mercifully ended.

Low.1: A dry tickle at the back of the throat — easy to dismiss, hard to forget.
Low.2: The lips feel a touch too dry, the mouth a shade too empty.
Low.3: Thirst whispers its first warning, gentle as sand shifting in wind.

Medium.1: The throat tightens, each swallow a conscious effort against rising dryness.
Medium.2: Thirst sharpens into something unavoidable, a constant companion demanding attention.
Medium.3: The tongue begins to stick, thoughts circling inevitably back to water.

High.1: Every swallow is a razor blade. The body screams for what it cannot have.
High.2: Dehydration draws a veil over the mind — thoughts come slow and sticky as tar.
High.3: The tongue becomes a dead thing, swollen and cracked like sun-baked earth.

Critical.1: Thirst is the cruelest need — it kills faster and hurts worse than all the others.
Critical.2: The blood thickens, the heart labors, and every cell cries out for moisture.
Critical.3: Vision swims. Reality bends. The body is a desert consuming itself.

High.1: A few precious drops ease the worst of it, but the body still aches for more.
High.2: The razor edge of thirst dulls, though the throat still burns.
High.3: Some relief, like the first drops before a storm — not enough, but a promise.

Medium.1: Water finds its way through parched channels, and the mind begins to clear.
Medium.2: The desperate edge fades. Swallowing no longer feels like a punishment.
Medium.3: Hydration returns in careful measures, each sip a small act of mercy.

Low.1: The crisis passes. The throat remembers what comfort feels like.
Low.2: Almost whole again — the body hoards every drop like a miser counting gold.
Low.3: Thirst retreats to a whisper, barely audible over the sound of recovery.

Safe.1: Water hits parched lips like a benediction, spreading life through desiccated veins.
Safe.2: The relief is so sharp it borders on pain — the body drinking in salvation.
Safe.3: Fully quenched at last. The memory of thirst lingers like a bad dream.

Low.1: A yawn that comes from somewhere deep, a gentle tug toward rest.
Low.2: The eyelids grow heavy with the first suggestion of fatigue.
Low.3: Weariness settles in the limbs like fine sand filling an hourglass.

Medium.1: Exhaustion wraps around them like a heavy cloak, dulling senses and slowing steps.
Medium.2: The body moves as though wading through honey — every action requiring twice the effort.
Medium.3: Focus slips away like water through fingers, fatigue clouding the mind.

High.1: The weight of consciousness becomes unbearable, gravity pulling at every thought.
High.2: Exhaustion wraps around them like a burial shroud, heavy and inescapable.
High.3: Their bones ache with a fatigue so deep it feels geological.

Critical.1: The body shuts down in stages, like lights going out one by one in an empty building.
Critical.2: Consciousness flickers — a candle guttering in a draft it can no longer resist.
Critical.3: Beyond exhaustion now. The body operates on nothing but desperate, animal stubbornness.

High.1: A brief reprieve. Not enough to restore, but enough to stave off collapse.
High.2: The heaviest weight lifts, though exhaustion still sits in every joint.
High.3: Some energy returns — a trickle where a flood is needed.

Medium.1: Rest peels away the worst layers of exhaustion like bandages from a healing wound.
Medium.2: The fog begins to thin. Thoughts form more easily, limbs move more freely.
Medium.3: Recovery, slow and welcome, seeps into tired muscles.

Low.1: Energy returns in slow waves, each one reaching a little further into deadened limbs.
Low.2: Nearly restored. The body hums with quiet gratitude for the chance to recover.
Low.3: Strength rebuilds itself, brick by patient brick.

Safe.1: Fully rested at last — the world sharpens, colors brighten, thoughts crystallize.
Safe.2: Vitality surges back like a river finding its course after a drought.
Safe.3: The exhaustion is gone. Every breath feels like the first one in days.

Low.1: A chill creeps in at the edges — fingertips, ear tips, the tip of the nose.
Low.2: The cold makes itself known with a gentle, persistent shiver.
Low.3: Gooseflesh rises unbidden, the body's first quiet alarm.

Medium.1: The cold tightens its grip, turning breath to mist and joints to rust.
Medium.2: Shivering becomes involuntary, the body burning fuel it can't afford to spend.
Medium.3: Warmth retreats to the core, abandoning the extremities to encroaching frost.

High.1: The cold doesn't bite — it swallows. Numbness spreads like frost across glass.
High.2: Ice crystallizes in the blood, each heartbeat pumping winter deeper.
High.3: Thought slows to a crawl, the cold wrapping around the mind like a frozen fist.

Critical.1: The shivering stops — a terrible sign. The body has given up generating warmth.
Critical.2: A treacherous drowsiness descends, the cold's most seductive and lethal trick.
Critical.3: Flesh turns white at the edges. The body is losing its war with winter.

High.1: A thin thread of warmth — enough to hold on to, not enough to thaw.
High.2: The worst numbness recedes, replaced by the painful sting of returning sensation.
High.3: The shivering intensifies — paradoxically, a good sign. The body fights again.

Medium.1: Warmth returns in painful increments, thawing frozen nerves back to life.
Medium.2: The cold loosens its grip, though the chill still sits deep in the bones.
Medium.3: Feeling returns to the extremities — pins and needles, then blessed warmth.

Low.1: Nearly warm again. The cold becomes a memory, fading with each passing moment.
Low.2: Color returns to pale skin, circulation remembering its ancient routes.
Low.3: The body relaxes its desperate grip on its remaining heat. The danger has passed.

Safe.1: Warmth creeps back like dawn, painful and beautiful in equal measure.
Safe.2: The cold is vanquished. Every limb tingles with the joy of restored warmth.
Safe.3: Fully thawed and whole. The frost is nothing but a fading nightmare.

Low.1: A thin sheen of sweat forms — the body's first acknowledgment of rising heat.
Low.2: The warmth presses in, not yet oppressive but no longer comfortable.
Low.3: Skin flushes as the body begins its quiet, constant work of cooling.

Medium.1: The heat presses down like a physical weight, squeezing moisture from every pore.
Medium.2: Sweat runs freely now, the body desperately dumping heat it cannot contain.
Medium.3: The air shimmers and thoughts waver, concentration melting in the heat.

High.1: The air itself becomes hostile, each breath like inhaling from an oven.
High.2: Dizziness swirls as the body's cooling systems begin to fail under the assault.
High.3: The heat is a hammer, and the body is the anvil. Something has to give.

Critical.1: Sweat dries before it forms. The body cooks from the inside, slow and merciless.
Critical.2: Vision darkens at the edges. The heat has become a living enemy.
Critical.3: The body surrenders — muscles cramp, skin burns, consciousness wavers in the inferno.

High.1: A whisper of cool air — barely enough, but the body seizes on it like a lifeline.
High.2: The worst of the heat breaks, though the air still shimmers with residual fury.
High.3: Temperature drops a fraction. The body dares to hope.

Medium.1: The oppressive weight lifts by degrees, sweat finally doing its intended work.
Medium.2: Breathing comes easier as the air loses some of its punishing edge.
Medium.3: The furnace dims. Thought and movement return to something approaching normal.

Low.1: Cool air washes over heated skin, and the body remembers what comfort means.
Low.2: Nearly recovered. The flush fades, the pulse steadies, the world stops wavering.
Low.3: The heat retreats, leaving behind only the faint memory of its oppression.

Safe.1: Cool relief washes over fevered skin, the body's furnace slowly banking.
Safe.2: The heat is broken. Every cool breeze feels like a gift from merciful gods.
Safe.3: Temperature returns to blessed normalcy. The ordeal melts away like morning frost.

Low.1: A nagging sense of wrongness — the ground too hard, the air too still.
Low.2: Discomfort whispers from a dozen small sources, none serious, all irritating.
Low.3: The body shifts restlessly, seeking a position that doesn't exist.

Medium.1: Every surface is wrong. Every position aches. Rest becomes a distant fantasy.
Medium.2: The body complains in a chorus of small agonies — cramped, sore, unsatisfied.
Medium.3: Comfort is a memory now, replaced by the constant fidgeting of the miserable.

High.1: Every surface is wrong. Every position aches. The body has forgotten what ease feels like.
High.2: Misery settles into the joints and won't be dislodged by any shift or stretch.
High.3: The relentless discomfort grinds away at patience and sanity alike.

Critical.1: Comfort is a word from another life. The body exists only in states of suffering.
Critical.2: Pain, pressure, heat, cold — the body is assaulted from every angle, with no respite.
Critical.3: The mind begins to fray under the constant, unrelenting assault of discomfort.

High.1: A small mercy — one less ache, one less source of grinding misery.
High.2: The worst edge dulls, though comfort remains a distant shore.
High.3: Something shifts, and the body finds a fraction of relief in the adjustment.

Medium.1: The body begins to unclench, finding positions that don't actively punish.
Medium.2: Comfort returns in fragments — a softer surface, a gentler temperature.
Medium.3: The constant fidgeting slows. Not comfortable yet, but no longer miserable.

Low.1: Almost at ease. The last whispers of discomfort fade to background noise.
Low.2: The body settles, muscles unknotting one by one like released fists.
Low.3: Comfort creeps back like a cat returning to a warm spot — quietly, gratefully.

Safe.1: Comfort settles in like a warm blanket, muscles unknotting one by one.
Safe.2: At ease at last. The body sinks into comfort with the relief of a long-held breath released.
Safe.3: Every ache and pressure point dissolves. Bliss, simple and complete.

Low.1: A shadow passes at the edge of vision — there and gone. Probably nothing.
Low.2: Thoughts loop in strange patterns, circling truths the mind isn't ready to face.
Low.3: The world seems slightly off-kilter, as if viewed through warped glass.

Medium.1: Reality frays at the edges, threads of certainty unraveling one by one.
Medium.2: The mind bends under weights it was never built to carry.
Medium.3: Whispers in the static. Patterns in the chaos. The mind reaches for meaning that isn't there.

High.1: Shadows whisper truths that sane minds refuse to hear.
High.2: The boundary between real and unreal thins to gossamer — and something presses through.
High.3: Thoughts fracture and reassemble wrong, like a mirror shattered and reglued by alien hands.

Critical.1: Sanity is a shore receding in the distance, and the current pulls only deeper.
Critical.2: The mind cracks open and something terrible and beautiful pours in.
Critical.3: Reality dissolves. What replaces it is worse — and somehow, more true.

High.1: A moment of clarity pierces the fog — brief, fragile, desperately needed.
High.2: The worst visions recede, though their echoes still ring in the hollows of the mind.
High.3: The mind steadies, if only for a moment. A handhold on the cliff face of reason.

Medium.1: Clarity returns like a lighthouse beam cutting through madness-fog.
Medium.2: The world begins to make sense again, piece by tentative piece.
Medium.3: The whispers quiet. The shadows thin. Reality reasserts its familiar, comforting shape.

Low.1: The fractured pieces of reason slowly reassemble, clicking back into place.
Low.2: Nearly whole again. The madness fades like a fever dream in morning light.
Low.3: Thought flows clearly once more, a river returning to its proper banks.

Safe.1: Sanity restored — the world is solid, real, and blessedly ordinary.
Safe.2: The mind seals its cracks, rebuilding walls that should never have been breached.
Safe.3: Clarity, complete and brilliant. Whatever darkness touched the mind has been banished.

Low.1: A quiet sigh escapes — the kind that carries the weight of unspoken doubt.
Low.2: Enthusiasm dims by a shade. The road ahead seems longer than it did before.
Low.3: A flicker of doubt, small and persistent, like a candle flame in a draft.

Medium.1: Hope gutters like a candle in a hurricane. Why bother? Why try?
Medium.2: The weight of it all settles in — not crushing, but heavy, so heavy.
Medium.3: Purpose drains away like water from a cracked vessel. What's the point?

High.1: Despair is a quiet thing — it doesn't scream, it simply... stops.
High.2: The will to push forward crumbles, replaced by a leaden, gray indifference.
High.3: Every small setback feels like confirmation that nothing will ever improve.

Critical.1: There is nothing left to fight for. The spirit is a gutted building — hollow and cold.
Critical.2: Hope died somewhere back there. What remains is just... endurance without purpose.
Critical.3: The eyes go flat. The shoulders sag. The last ember of will winks out.

High.1: Something sparks in the darkness. Small, fragile, but undeniably alive.
High.2: A thin thread of determination — not hope, not yet, but the memory of it.
High.3: The heavy gray lifts by a fraction. Just enough to see one step ahead.

Medium.1: Morale returns not as a flood, but as a slow sunrise after endless night.
Medium.2: Purpose stirs, stretching cautiously like an animal emerging from hibernation.
Medium.3: The road ahead still stretches far, but the will to walk it has returned.

Low.1: Spirits lift. Laughter becomes possible again — tentative, surprised, real.
Low.2: Strength of will rebuilds itself, and the future no longer looks so bleak.
Low.3: The weight lifts. The horizon brightens. Purpose flows back in steady currents.

Safe.1: Morale restored — spirits burn bright, steady, and unshakeable.
Safe.2: The darkness is past. Conviction returns with a fierce, quiet certainty.
Safe.3: Hope doesn't just return — it surges, fierce and defiant, daring the world to try again.

Low.1: A dull throb makes itself known — insistent, like a knock at an unwelcome door.
Low.2: Pain announces its arrival quietly, settling in with the patience of an old enemy.
Low.3: The body sends its first sharp complaint — a warning shot across the bow.

Medium.1: Pain becomes a second heartbeat, pulsing bright and relentless.
Medium.2: Each movement draws a fresh line of fire through protesting nerves.
Medium.3: The body's protests grow louder, a chorus of injury demanding attention.

High.1: The body screams in a language older than words.
High.2: Pain becomes the world — everything else is distant, muffled, secondary.
High.3: Agony rewrites priorities. Nothing matters but making it stop.

Critical.1: Pain transcends sensation and becomes a place — a country with no borders and no exit.
Critical.2: The body has nothing left but to endure. Pain is the only reality now.
Critical.3: Beyond screaming, beyond tears. The body shuts down everything non-essential to survive.

High.1: The sharpest edge dulls. Still agonizing, but the body dares to believe it can endure.
High.2: Pain recedes by a fraction — enough to draw a breath that isn't a gasp.
High.3: The worst passes. What remains is still terrible, but survivable.

Medium.1: The pain retreats to a steady throb — constant, but no longer overwhelming.
Medium.2: Nerves quiet their screaming to a persistent, manageable complaint.
Medium.3: Movement becomes possible again, though each action is still a negotiation with pain.

Low.1: The pain fades to a dull echo, easily ignored if not dwelt upon.
Low.2: Relief washes through overtaxed nerves, the body slowly unclenching.
Low.3: Almost pain-free. The body holds its breath, scarcely daring to believe.

Safe.1: The pain recedes like a tide, leaving behind the strange euphoria of its absence.
Safe.2: Pain-free at last. The body trembles with the relief of it.
Safe.3: Gone. Every nerve sighs with a gratitude that borders on the sacred.

Low.1: A faint metallic taste blooms on the tongue — the first invisible warning.
Low.2: The air carries something wrong, felt before it's understood.
Low.3: A subtle nausea stirs, sourceless and unsettling.

Medium.1: Invisible fire rewrites their DNA one strand at a time. The body doesn't know it's dying yet.
Medium.2: Nausea rolls in waves, and the skin prickles with an energy that shouldn't be there.
Medium.3: The body's repair systems scramble to fix damage that keeps arriving faster than healing.

High.1: Cells mutiny, splitting and twisting into something wrong.
High.2: Blood rebels against its own purpose as radiation tears through tissue and marrow.
High.3: The body wages a silent, desperate war against an enemy it cannot see or touch.

Critical.1: The damage is deep, cellular, fundamental. The body breaks down at the level of blueprint.
Critical.2: Radiation burns from the inside — a fire without smoke, a wound without a weapon.
Critical.3: Life itself begins to unravel, the fundamental code of being corrupted beyond repair.

High.1: The invisible assault eases — still dangerous, but the body's defenses rally.
High.2: Exposure drops, and the body seizes the chance to shore up its crumbling defenses.
High.3: The nausea retreats a fraction, though the damage already done lingers.

Medium.1: Cells cautiously resume their ordered dance, healing what the radiation broke.
Medium.2: The metallic taste fades, and with it the worst of the nausea.
Medium.3: The body's repair systems gain ground, patching damage faster than it accumulates.

Low.1: The invisible poison fades, cells cautiously resuming their ancient, ordered dance.
Low.2: Recovery continues — slow, cellular, measured in molecules rather than moments.
Low.3: Nearly clean. The body's natural resilience slowly erases the invisible scars.

Safe.1: Clear of contamination at last. The body rebuilds what was broken, cell by patient cell.
Safe.2: The radiation is gone. What remains is healing — slow, steady, and profoundly welcome.
Safe.3: Clean. Safe. The body trembles with relief, its cells no longer under siege.

Low.1: A dark thought surfaces — unfamiliar, unwelcome, strangely compelling.
Low.2: Something shifts in the shadows of the soul, a weight that wasn't there before.
Low.3: The faintest stain spreads at the edge of consciousness, barely perceptible.

Medium.1: Something dark takes root, growing tendrils through the soul like black ivy.
Medium.2: The darkness whispers, and the terrible thing is — it starts to make sense.
Medium.3: A corruption of purpose creeps in, twisting noble instincts toward darker ends.

High.1: The corruption spreads like ink in water — slow, beautiful, and fatal.
High.2: The soul strains under a weight it was never meant to bear, cracks spreading through its foundation.
High.3: Right and wrong blur together. The darkness offers clarity the light never could.

Critical.1: The corruption is nearly complete. What remains of the original soul is just a thin veneer.
Critical.2: Darkness fills every corner, every crevice. The soul drowns in black water.
Critical.3: The taint has won. What looks back from behind those eyes is no longer entirely human.

High.1: A flicker of light in the dark — not much, but enough to remember what was lost.
High.2: The grip of corruption loosens by a fraction, and the soul gasps for air.
High.3: Something pure surfaces, struggling against the dark tide.

Medium.1: Light scours the darkness, burning away corruption like morning mist.
Medium.2: The soul shakes off some of its chains. The whispers grow quieter.
Medium.3: Clarity returns in patches, like sunlight breaking through storm clouds.

Low.1: The stain fades to almost nothing — a shadow of a shadow, easily ignored.
Low.2: The soul reasserts itself, pushing the last remnants of darkness to the margins.
Low.3: Nearly clean. The corruption retreats, hissing, from the light.

Safe.1: Purified. The soul shines again, unmarked and unbowed by the darkness that tested it.
Safe.2: The corruption is gone — banished, burned away, leaving only clean light.
Safe.3: Whole again, and stronger for the trial. The darkness found no permanent purchase.

Low.1: A gentle heaviness in the limbs — the body's quiet request for a slower pace.
Low.2: Energy levels dip, like a well drawing lower with each bucket.
Low.3: The first tendrils of fatigue wrap around the muscles, soft but insistent.

Medium.1: The world blurs at the edges as fatigue draws its curtain.
Medium.2: Muscles turn to lead, thoughts to molasses. Everything requires twice the effort.
Medium.3: Fatigue settles in like a fog, blurring edges and slowing reflexes.

High.1: The body moves on borrowed time, each action paying interest on a growing debt.
High.2: Fatigue becomes a physical thing — a weight strapped to every limb, a chain on every thought.
High.3: Reactions slow to a crawl. The body operates on fumes and stubbornness alone.

Critical.1: The tank is empty. The body runs on nothing but sheer, desperate will.
Critical.2: Collapse looms — inevitable, unavoidable. The body has given everything it has.
Critical.3: Fatigue wins its war of attrition. Even standing requires a kind of heroism.

High.1: A small reserve, scraped from the bottom of the barrel. It won't last, but it helps.
High.2: The heaviest chains of fatigue loosen, though the body still staggers under the load.
High.3: Some energy returns — not enough to thrive, but enough to survive.

Medium.1: Vitality seeps back in, quiet and steady as a turning tide.
Medium.2: The fog of fatigue begins to lift, revealing a world that was always there.
Medium.3: Strength returns in welcome increments, each one a small victory.

Low.1: Energy rebuilds steadily, the body's reserves slowly filling back up.
Low.2: Nearly restored. The body hums with quiet gratitude for the chance to recover.
Low.3: Fatigue becomes a whisper, easily drowned out by returning vigor.

Safe.1: Fully recharged. The body surges with the energy of complete recovery.
Safe.2: Fatigue is a distant memory. Every muscle responds with eager readiness.
Safe.3: Restored, revitalized, ready. The body remembers what it feels like to be whole.

Low.1: The environment shifts — a subtle wrongness in the air, in the ground, in the light.
Low.2: Something about this place sets the nerves on edge, though it's hard to say what.
Low.3: The surroundings press in with a vague, unfocused hostility.

Medium.1: The environment turns hostile, pressing in from all sides.
Medium.2: The world grows teeth — sharp edges, harsh surfaces, an unforgiving landscape.
Medium.3: Every element conspires: the terrain punishes, the air resists, the ground begrudges each step.

High.1: Nature shows its teeth — indifferent, merciless, absolute.
High.2: The environment is no longer a setting — it's an adversary, and a patient one.
High.3: Survival becomes the only thought as the world itself becomes a weapon.

Critical.1: This place is actively trying to kill them. Every moment of survival is a small miracle.
Critical.2: The environment reaches its breaking point — or rather, theirs. Something has to give.
Critical.3: Beyond hostile. The world is a machine of destruction, and they are caught in its gears.

High.1: The environment relents by a fraction — enough to catch a breath, plan a next move.
High.2: The worst of the assault passes, though the surroundings remain far from friendly.
High.3: A thin margin of safety opens. Not comfortable, but survivable.

Medium.1: The pressure eases. The world remembers how to be kind.
Medium.2: Conditions improve — still challenging, but no longer threatening.
Medium.3: The environment shifts from enemy to obstacle. Manageable, if unpleasant.

Low.1: The surroundings soften toward something approaching habitable.
Low.2: Almost comfortable. The environment withdraws its hostility to a low grumble.
Low.3: Conditions normalize. The worst is clearly past.

Safe.1: The environment settles into calm. Safe ground, breathable air, solid footing.
Safe.2: All clear. The world is hospitable once more, and every sense relaxes with relief.
Safe.3: Safety, genuine and complete. The environment is no longer a concern.
